chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-4418 of 2023 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.20375/2023. 3. For hearing of main case. 23.09.2025 Ms. Saima Imdad, AAG. Mr. Naseer Ahmed, advocate and Ms. Rehamt-un-Nisa, advocate for respondents No.4, 5 and 8. Mr. Zubair Akhter, advocate for KMC. ------------- This is an old petition of 2023. On 02.04.2024 none was present for the petitioner without intimation. On 03.05.2024 a counsel held brief for learned counsel for the petitioner. In the last one and half years, learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to diligently pursue this petition. Today, despite the lapse of one and half years, once again none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that petitioner has lost interest to pursue this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution along with pending application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
